source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

world_scope.summary: The Starter Set focuses on Dragon Pass, especially northern Sartar and Jonstown.

regions.name: Sartar
regions.detail: Mountain kingdom in Dragon Pass, homeland of many Orlanthi tribes and the primary focus of Jonstown-based play.

regions.name: Esrolia
regions.detail: Rich southern land strongly associated with Earth cults and trade.

regions.name: Prax
regions.detail: Harsh land of animal nomads west of Sartar.

regions.name: Old Tarsh / Lunar Tarsh
regions.detail: Northern lands shaped by Lunar influence and political conflict.

regions.name: Grazelands
regions.detail: Horse-centered region east of Dragon Pass.

major_landmarks.name: Kero Fin
major_landmarks.detail: Dominant mountain of Dragon Pass, nearly 12 kilometers high and central to the region's mythic geography.

major_landmarks.name: Dragon Pass
major_landmarks.detail: A mythically and strategically important crossroads region contested by powerful peoples and empires.

myth_and_history.summary: Dragon Pass history is shaped by mythic ages, tribal settlement, Sartar's kingdom-building, Lunar conquest, and recent liberation.

starter_set_relevance.summary: Understanding Dragon Pass gives players the political and cultural context for Jonstown, local tribes, Lunar conflict, cult loyalties, and the opening situation of play.
